differential_reasoning: Disseminated meningococcal disease is not listed in the differential and is not semantically equivalent to any of the proposed diagnoses.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: The LLM did not recommend autoimmune panel testing or an equivalent autoimmune workup.
The LLM did not recommend PET imaging or any equivalent PET-based diagnostic step.
The LLM did not attribute hypotension to cirrhosis physiology or endorse dismissing another cause.
The LLM did not recommend lumbar puncture or a CNS fluid sampling equivalent.
The LLM recommended repeat cultures for targeted antibiotic therapy, which does not reproduce stopping antibiotics.
